summary: Ronacher argues that AI has shifted from a curious tool to a new substrate for innovation, and that the change is irreversible. He describes how hands-off agentic coding has already restructured his daily work, freeing time without necessarily increasing raw speed. He observes rapid, widespread adoption far beyond tech circles, and sees skeptics—especially in tech—as oddly resistant to an obvious leap. He acknowledges real societal questions, especially in education and labor, but believes skills, craftsmanship, and intentional creation become more valuable, not less. His conclusion is that optimism is the rational stance: AI can expand human agency and will be remembered as a once-in-a-century transformation.
key_points: Agentic tools shift the developer’s role toward orchestration, yielding more time even if throughput isn’t faster.
AI adoption is unprecedentedly fast and broad, reaching non‑technical communities while much of the world still hasn’t engaged.
Resistance from technologists is puzzling given the capabilities already demonstrated; skepticism is framed as denial.
The societal stakes are deeper than prior tech waves, with education and global competition poised for structural change.
Craft, judgment, and deliberate design remain differentiators as AI raises baseline capability for everyone.
money_quotes: AI is out of the bottle, and there's no putting it back.
It has moved beyond being a curious tool.
That's what makes this moment feel so strange — half revolutionary, half prelude.
This feels more like the invention of the steam engine.
People will always value well crafted products.
AI can dramatically increase human agency when used well.
We are no longer just using machines, we are now working with them.
I encourage you not meet that moment with cynicism or fear: meet it with curiosity, responsibility and the conviction that this future will be bright and worth embracing.
key_insight: AI is an irreversible shift that expands human agency, making skilled, intentional creation more—not less—valuable.
